name: Kayzen
description: Self-serve mobile programmatic DSP for app user acquisition, retargeting, and brand performance campaigns.

seo.title: Kayzen — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Kayzen: Self-serve mobile programmatic DSP for app user acquisition, retargeting, and brand performance campaigns.

when_to_use: Self-serve mobile DSP for app marketers managing their own UA campaigns
Programmatic retargeting for lapsed mobile app users via self-service platform
Brand performance campaigns with transparent programmatic mobile inventory
App user acquisition with full auction-level data access on Kayzen DSP

pros: Truly self-serve programmatic DSP for apps
cons: You do the media buying yourself
review.verdict: Best self-serve DSP for sophisticated mobile marketers who want real programmatic control.
review.best_for: In-house UA teams with programmatic chops wanting full media buying transparency.
review.not_for: Marketers wanting a managed service or turnkey campaign execution.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
